description: Examines the political, social, and economic aspects of the evolution of the Arab-Israeli conflict over time, and the theoretical and policy issues it raises. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 631 prior to fall 2017

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 120,140,182orINTL ST 101) or (POLI SCI 103, 106, or 186 taken prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing
